description: Worked on the Jio Associate Verification System, a secure platform for field associate validation using Node.js & Express.js.
Integrated OTP-based authentication, JWT authorization, and AES-256 encryption ensuring compliance with GDPR and enterprise security standards.
Collaborated with Flutter frontend and backend teams to establish modular architecture.
Documented full-stack architecture and CI/CD workflow to ensure scalability and maintainability.

Engineered a multi-factor biometric desktop authentication system combining voice verification, face recognition, fingerprint scanning, eye blink sequence detection, and neck movement recognition for identity and speaker verification in secure and monitored environments.

Implemented fingerprint sequence matching using pattern recognition and minutiae-based feature extraction, and eye blink sequence matching via temporal frame analysis to detect user-defined blink patterns as a spoof authentication factor.

Deployed real-time deep learning inference pipelines using CNN and YOLO object detection models, applying advanced computer vision and signal processing techniques for robust authentication across biometric modalities.
